login.title: Login to your account
login.description: Enter your phone number and password below to login to your account

signup.title: Create an account
signup.description: Enter your information below to create your account
signup.password_hint: Must be at least 8 characters long.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.step1_description: Enter your phone number to receive a reset code.
forgot_password.step2_description: Enter the code sent to your phone.
forgot_password.step3_description: Set a new password for your account.
forgot_password.password_hint: Must be at least 8 characters long.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.dialog_description: Open a new bank account. Fill in the details below.
accounts.toast_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields

account_detail.not_found_description: This account doesn't exist or has been removed.

cards.title: Cards
cards.description: Manage your debit and credit cards
cards.dialog_description: Request a new debit or credit card. Fill in the details below.
cards.not_found_description: The card you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
cards.toast_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields
cards.toast_fill_credit_limit: Please enter a credit limit for credit cards

operations.title: Operations
operations.description: View all your transactions and transfers
operations.not_found_description: This operation doesn't exist or has been removed.

payments.title: New Payment
payments.description: Choose a payment method and send money
payments.phone_hint: The recipient will receive the payment to their default account
payments.card_hint: Payment will be sent to the account linked to this card
payments.description_placeholder: Add a note about this payment
payments.note_base: Note: Payments are processed immediately. Please verify all details before sending.
payments.note_phone: Phone number payments use the recipient's registered default account.
payments.note_card: Card payments are sent to the linked bank account.
payments.select_method: Select a payment method above to get started
payments.toast_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.password_description: Update your password to keep your account secure
settings.password_hint: Password must be at least 8 characters long
settings.appearance_description: Customize how the app looks and feels
settings.toast_fill_required: Please fill in all required fields
settings.toast_password_fill: Please fill in all password fields
settings.toast_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long

not_found.title: Not Found
not_found.description: The item you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
